name: JEJUNAL DIVERTICULAR DISEASE
definition: JEJUNAL DIVERTICULOSIS rarest form of gastrointestinal diverticular disease

demographics.Frequency: 0.5-1.1-2.3% on UGI; 0.3-4.5% of autopsy series; M > F
demographics.Location: 80% in jejunum, 15% in ileum (usually solitary), 5% in jejunum + ileum

distribution: 80% in jejunum, 15% in ileum (usually solitary), 5% in jejunum + ileum
discriminating_features: slight dilatation of intestinal loops in area of diverticula
may not fill (narrow neck / stagnant secretions)
trapped barium on delayed film after 24 hours

general: slight dilatation of intestinal loops in area of diverticula
may not fill (narrow neck / stagnant secretions)
trapped barium on delayed film after 24 hours
